title: Two-Bottle Choice Protocol
steps: Record weekly body weights of animals for calculation of solution intake as mg/kg
Mix and fill required solutions in bottles
Record weight of all bottles prior to drinking session
Put bottles on cages with solution A on left and B on right (rotate side position each day) and leave for 24 hours
Following 24 hours remove bottles from caging being careful not to spill any liquid
Record weight of all bottles after drinking session
Subtract weight of each bottle after drinking from weight of same bottle prior to drinking to calculate liquid consumed and record in notebook
Rinse bottles and re-mix and fill solutions in bottles
Record new weights and place bottles back on cages with positions swapped
Repeat all steps daily as desired
creator: Molly Brennan
